catalog.heading: Usha Shop

usha-chest-rig.name: Usha Chest Rig — PU Leather Utility Bag
usha-chest-rig.tagline: Everything you need, close to you. Nothing weighing down your pockets.
usha-chest-rig.description: The Usha Chest Rig is the clean answer to "where do I put my stuff?" A soft PU leather chest rig that carries your phone, wallet, keys and power bank — without you feeling it. An adjustable cross-strap that sits just as well over a hoodie as a blazer. Less clutter. More class.
features: 2 pockets + zip compartment for smart storage
Adjustable cross-strap — fits most body types
Soft, durable PU (vegan) leather with metal zippers
Stays put when you move — made for the city, travel, festivals
Arrives in an Usha dust bag
includes: Usha Chest Rig in your chosen colour

size.label: Size
size.value: approx. 22 × 18 cm · strap adjustable up to ~120 cm

fits.label: Fits
fits.value: Phones up to 6.7", wallet, keys, power bank, passport

seo.title: Usha Chest Rig – PU Leather Utility Bag | Usha Shop
seo.description: Clean PU leather chest rig for phone, wallet & keys. Available in 8 colours. Free shipping over €59. 14-day returns.

usha-belt-bag.name: Usha Belt Bag — PU Leather Waist Belt
usha-belt-bag.tagline: A slim belt with two pouches. Phone, cards, keys — hands free.
usha-belt-bag.description: The Usha Belt Bag turns a belt into your bag. A slim PU-leather waist belt with two pouches — a flap pocket and a phone sleeve — plus a handy key clip. Wear it high on the waist over a dress or jeans. Less bag. More look.
features: Slim belt with two pouches (flap pocket + phone sleeve)
Adjustable fit, worn on the waist
includes: Usha Belt Bag in your chosen colour (belt + 2 pouches)

fits.label: Fits
fits.value: Phone, cards, keys, lip balm, cash

usha-belt-bag.materialNote: PU leather (vegan leather) — not genuine leather.

terms.title: Terms of purchase
terms.body: These terms apply to purchases from Usha Shop (shop.usha.se), operated by Usha AB (reg. no. 559401-8326). Prices are shown including VAT. Your order is binding once payment is confirmed. We reserve the right to decline or cancel an order in the event of obvious pricing or stock errors. Payment is handled securely by Stripe (card, Klarna, Swish, Apple Pay, Google Pay). Contact us at pablo.acosta@usha.se with any questions about your order.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.body: Usha AB (reg. no. 559401-8326) is the data controller for the information you provide when ordering. We process your name, address, email and order details to fulfil the purchase, arrange shipping and meet bookkeeping obligations. Payment is handled by Stripe; card details are never stored by us. Order details are shared with our fulfilment partner solely to deliver your item. Under the GDPR you have the right to access, correct and erase your data — email pablo.acosta@usha.se.

returns.title: Returns & refunds
returns.body: You have a 14-day right of withdrawal under EU distance-selling rules, counted from the day you receive the item. Notify us at pablo.acosta@usha.se before returning. The item must be returned in essentially unchanged condition. We refund the purchase including standard shipping within 14 days of receiving the return or proof that it has been sent. You cover the cost of return shipping. This does not affect your statutory rights if the item is faulty.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.body: We process your order within 1–3 business days. Items ship from our global warehouse and typical delivery is 7–15 business days. Free shipping on orders over €59; otherwise a flat shipping fee applies, shown at checkout. You receive a tracking link by email once your order ships.
